title: Data Spasial: Koordinat, Sistem Referensi, Jarak, dan Kedekatan
scope: Location as features. Coordinates, reference systems, distance & proximity.
key_concepts: Raw latitude and longitude are often poor features on their own because standard algorithms treat them as independent numerical values, ignoring their spatial relationship and the earth's curvature.
Coordinate Reference Systems (CRS) must be handled correctly. Converting spherical coordinates (like WGS84) to projected Cartesian systems (like UTM) allows Euclidean distance calculations.
Distance features transform coordinates into meaningful continuous variables (e.g., distance to the nearest landmark).
Proximity features count or measure entities within a specific radius, capturing the density or context of a location.

definitions.meaning: Sistem yang menghubungkan koordinat dengan permukaan bumi secara akurat (misalnya WGS84 untuk lintang/bujur bola, UTM untuk proyeksi datar).
Jarak terpendek antara dua titik pada permukaan bola, digunakan jika koordinat tidak diproyeksikan.

examples: Predicting house prices: instead of passing latitude and longitude, derive 'distance to city center', 'distance to nearest station', and 'number of cafes within 1 km'.

figures.caption: Transformasi dari koordinat mentah menjadi fitur spasial yang bermakna.
figures.description: Ilustrasi titik lokasi yang dipecah menjadi beberapa anak panah yang melambangkan jarak ke stasiun, jarak ke pusat kota, dan radius kedekatan dengan fasilitas umum.

relations: Foundational spatial section. Will be followed by spatial autocorrelation.
